pipeline_metadata.query_template:
Identify clauses related to:
- Payment terms and schedules
- Late payment penalties
- Invoice and billing requirements
- Refund policies
- Financial obligations
- Fee structures
- Cost reimbursement
- Payment default consequences

extracted_clauses: In the event of payment default exceeding 60 days, the Service Provider reserves the right to:
Late payments will incur a penalty fee of 2% per month on the outstanding balance.
An additional late fee of $50 applies for payments overdue by more than 15 days.
All setup fees, onboarding costs, and prepaid service fees are non-refundable once services
Service fees may be refunded on a pro-rata basis if services are terminated with 30 days
written notice, subject to no outstanding invoices.
evidence: In the event of payment default exceeding 60 days, the Service Provider reserves the right to:
Late payments will incur a penalty fee of 2% per month on the outstanding balance.
An additional late fee of $50 applies for payments overdue by more than 15 days.

risk_factors: High financial risk identified (2 penalty clauses)
risk_summary.financial_impact: HIGH - Multiple penalties and strict payment terms

raw_context:
In the event of payment default exceeding 60 days, the Service Provider reserves the right to:
- Suspend services immediately
- Charge collection costs and legal fees
- Report the default to credit agencies

Late payments will incur a penalty fee of 2% per month on the outstanding balance.

An additional late fee of $50 applies for payments overdue by more than 15 days.

All setup fees, onboarding costs, and prepaid service fees are non-refundable once services 
have commenced.

Service fees may be refunded on a pro-rata basis if services are terminated with 30 days 
written notice, subject to no outstanding invoices.
